refnamediv.refpurpose: define the location of peaks and troughs

listitem.para: * peak = 0 if a peak does not not belong to the recession phase
* trough = 0 if a trough does not not belong to the recession phase
* nothing: data are saved in the database: GROCERDIR+'/macros/grocer/db/define_recession.dat'

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Defines whether peaks and troughs belong to a recession phase.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
